# **Part III: Hotspot Groups**

-   [Hotspot Groups Overview](GroupsIntroduction.qmd)

-   [Parent Hotspots](ParentHotspots.qmd)

    -   [Parent Hotspot Content](ParentHotspotContent.qmd)
    -   [Additional Parent Hotspot UI](AdditionalParentHotspotUI.qmd)
    -   [Data Aggregation](DataAggregation.qmd)
    -   [Parent Hotspot Placement](ParentHotspotPlacement.qmd)
    -   [Naming Parent Hotspots and Sub-hotspots](NamingParentandSub-Hotspots.qmd)
    -   [List-building Parent Hotspots](List-buildingParentHotspots.qmd)

-   [Creating and Managing Hotspot Groups](CreatingandManaging.qmd)

-   [Multi-Region Hotspot Groups](Multi-RegionHotspotGroups.qmd)

-   [Hotspot Group FAQs](HotspotGroupFAQs.qmd)
